title: Ame's Stuff Resourcepack
body:
If you playing [Ame's Stuff Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ame-stuff-datapack), install it to get the best experience. --- If you want to translate this pack, just send me translated resourcepack language files. I will update the resourcepack ;D --- **Credit** | User | | | :--: | :--: | | KanekiAkira | Idea Proposer / Item Models | **Supporter** | Platform | User | Tier | Message | | :-- | :--: | :--: | :-- | | Patreon | SANS-Human | Satellite | Ultra Kill | --- **If you want to see me create more content, supporting my work gives me the energy to make more stuff.**
> [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a368690a65792758810fc081de33e5fa9c5a04.png)](https://ko-fi.com/focalsalt)
> [![Support me on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150ad87ca2fc99b8e1ebb73e00d2ac1c9a6d0c83.png)](https://patreon.com/focalsalt) --- Any BUG or Suggest, welcome to my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sErWHY8PXH) to report.
Hope you like it, enjoy :D
